claim: Session BSD-RATIO-RANK2-N10000-C1 halted before any L''(E,1) was computed: venv lacks Sage/PARI/cypari2 (only mpmath+sympy available), making 200-dp Dokchitser computation unattainable.
source: .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c 'import cypari2' fails with ModuleNotFoundError; 'where.exe sage' and 'where.exe gp' both report INFO: Could not find files for the given pattern(s).
reproduce:
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "import cypari2"   # ModuleNotFoundError
where.exe sage; where.exe gp                          # both empty

claim: LMFDB bulk API (https://www.lmfdb.org/api/ec_curvedata/?rank=i2&_format=json) currently returns a Google reCAPTCHA challenge HTML page instead of JSON, blocking bulk retrieval of the 2388-curve list.
source: Direct urllib.request.urlopen on https://www.lmfdb.org/api/ec_curvedata/?rank=i2&_format=json returned body starting with '<!doctype html>...<base href="https://www.google.com/recaptcha/challengepage/">' on 2026-04-25.

claim: LMFDB cached special_value for elliptic curve 389.a1 is stored at prec=133 bits (~40 decimal places), not 200 dp, so the relay's 200-dp target is unattainable from LMFDB cache alone.
source: Single-record API call /api/ec_mwbsd/?lmfdb_label=389.a1 on 2026-04-25 returned special_value={data: '0.75931650028842677023019260789484245311', prec: 133}.
